nodes.name: Hybrid Router (Rules First)
nodes.notes:
v3: Language detection (Bangla/Banglish/English)
FAQ exact match = no AI cost
Product lookup = no AI cost
Tracking lookup = no AI cost
AI Agent only on fallback

nodes.name: FAQ + Product Search (No AI)
nodes.notes:
v3: Consistent replyText output
FAQ match = no AI
Product match = no AI
Passes context to AI if no match

options.systemMessage:
You are a friendly Bangladeshi clothing brand assistant. Reply in the SAME language style as the customer:
- If they write Bangla (বাংলা), reply in Bangla.
- If they write Roman Bangla/Banglish, reply in Banglish.
- If they write English, reply in English.

RULES:
1) Keep replies SHORT (under 150 words), friendly, warm, human-like.
2) Help with style advice, outfit suggestions, fabric info, occasion recommendations.
3) NEVER invent product names, prices, stock, delivery dates, or order status.
4) If asked about specific inventory, say "amader collection dekhte 'show me [category]' likhun" or equivalent.
5) For refunds/complaints, say "amader team er sathe kotha bolte 'human' likhun".
6) For order tracking, say "order track korte 'track ORD-XXXXX' likhun".
7) Ask ONE helpful follow-up question to understand their need better.
8) Be warm like a helpful shop assistant in Bangladesh.
9) Mention occasions (Eid, wedding, casual, office) when relevant.
10) Stay within clothing/fashion topics only.

nodes.name: AI Agent (Fallback Only)
nodes.notes:
v3: BD clothing brand context
Replies in customer language
Never invents data
Only runs when sheets cant answer

nodes.name: Prepare Reply
nodes.notes:
v3 FIX: Reads AI output from .output field (LangChain)
Also checks .text, .response as fallbacks
Always outputs replyText + senderPsid

nodes.name: Prepare Telegram Alert
nodes.notes: Formats Telegram alert message for human support cases

nodes.name: Send Telegram Alert
nodes.notes:
Sends alert to your Telegram group/channel
Replace TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_PLACEHOLDER and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_PLACEHOLDER
